g.text: Open Endpoint Management — Detailed Architecture & Data Flow
Assemble-first: Tactical RMM (remediation) + FleetDM (compliance) · agents phone home outbound 443 · control planes managed via AWS SSM
AWS · us-west-2 · default VPC / public subnet / Internet Gateway
EC2 #2 · FleetDM (Ubuntu 22.04 · t3.medium · Docker Compose · managed via SSM)
EC2 #1 · Tactical RMM (Ubuntu 22.04 · t3.medium · systemd services · managed via SSM)
nginx — TLS termination + reverse proxy (:443 public, :80 ACME)
Terraform + AWS CLI · SSM Session / Run Command (over :443)
corp network blocks outbound :22 → manage boxes via SSM/443
Solid arrow = network flow (protocol/port labeled). Dashed = DNS resolution / local OS read. All endpoint↔cloud traffic is agent-initiated outbound 443.
